description: Lido core contracts Hardhat 3 migration branch (NomicFoundation/lidofinance-core PR #1) including their Mocha test suite.

reset files & cache.command: git checkout -- test/common/math256.t.sol test/common/lib/BLS.t.sol contracts/common/lib/Math256.sol && npx hardhat clean

edit & compile Solidity test with min de.command: printf "\n// hardhat benchmark edit\n" >> test/common/math256.t.sol && npx hardhat compile

edit & compile Solidity test with max de.command: printf "\n// hardhat benchmark edit\n" >> test/common/lib/BLS.t.sol && npx hardhat compile

edit & compile Solidity contract: contra.command: printf "\n// hardhat benchmark edit\n" >> contracts/common/lib/Math256.sol && npx hardhat compile
